name: Onboarding Checklist
description: Standard onboarding checklist for new employees

tasks.title: Welcome Meeting
tasks.description: Meet with your manager and team lead to discuss your onboarding plan
tasks.instructions: Schedule a 30-minute meeting with your manager on your first day.

tasks.title: HR Documentation
tasks.description: Complete all required HR forms and paperwork
tasks.instructions: Fill out tax forms, emergency contacts, and sign employment agreements.

tasks.title: Dev Environment Setup
tasks.description: Set up your local development environment
tasks.instructions: Install Docker, VS Code, clone repositories, and run the project locally.

tasks.title: Team Introduction
tasks.description: Meet all team members and understand team dynamics
tasks.instructions: Schedule short 15-minute intro calls with each team member.

tasks.title: First Code Review
tasks.description: Submit your first pull request and participate in code review
tasks.instructions: Pick a starter task, implement the solution, and submit a PR.

tasks.title: Security Training
tasks.description: Complete mandatory security awareness training
tasks.instructions: Watch the security training videos and pass the quiz.

tasks.title: Codebase Walkthrough
tasks.description: Get a guided walkthrough of the main codebase architecture
tasks.instructions: Schedule a session with your mentor to review the architecture.

tasks.title: Onboarding Survey
tasks.description: Complete the 30-day onboarding feedback survey
tasks.instructions: Fill out the survey honestly to help us improve the onboarding process.

tasks.title: Final Review
tasks.description: Final check-in with manager to review onboarding progress
tasks.instructions: Discuss your onboarding experience and set goals for the next quarter.

name: Engineering Onboarding
description: Technical onboarding for engineering team members

tasks.title: Architecture Overview
tasks.description: Learn the system architecture and microservices design
tasks.instructions: Review the architecture docs and attend the architecture walkthrough session.

tasks.title: CI/CD Pipeline Setup
tasks.description: Understand and configure the CI/CD pipeline for your projects
tasks.instructions: Review the Jenkins/GitHub Actions configuration and run a test deployment.

tasks.title: Database Schema Review
tasks.description: Review the database schema and understand data models
tasks.instructions: Study the ER diagrams and run sample queries against the dev database.

tasks.title: API Documentation Review
tasks.description: Read through all API documentation and test endpoints
tasks.instructions: Use the Swagger docs to test each service endpoint.

tasks.title: First Feature Implementation
tasks.description: Implement a small feature from the backlog independently
tasks.instructions: Pick a starter story, implement, test, and deploy to staging.

tasks.title: Code Review Participation
tasks.description: Review 5 PRs from other team members
tasks.instructions: Provide constructive feedback on code quality, performance, and style.

tasks.title: Production Readiness Checklist
tasks.description: Complete the production deployment readiness checklist
tasks.instructions: Review monitoring, alerting, rollback procedures, and runbooks.

name: Sales Onboarding
description: Onboarding program for sales team members

tasks.title: Welcome Meeting
tasks.description: Meet with your sales manager and team
tasks.instructions: Attend the welcome meeting and learn about team structure.

tasks.title: CRM Training
tasks.description: Learn to use the company CRM system
tasks.instructions: Complete the CRM training modules and practice entering leads.

tasks.title: Product Knowledge
tasks.description: Study all product offerings and pricing
tasks.instructions: Review product sheets, pricing guides, and competitor comparisons.

tasks.title: Sales Process Training
tasks.description: Learn the company sales process end-to-end
tasks.instructions: Study the sales playbook and attend the process training session.

tasks.title: Shadow Senior Rep
tasks.description: Shadow a senior sales representative on client calls
tasks.instructions: Join 3 client calls with a senior rep and take notes.

tasks.title: First Independent Calls
tasks.description: Make your first solo prospecting calls
tasks.instructions: Complete 20 cold calls using the provided scripts and leads.

tasks.title: Sales Certification
tasks.description: Pass the sales certification assessment
tasks.instructions: Complete the online sales certification exam with 80%+ score.

name: Product Onboarding
description: Onboarding program for product team members

tasks.title: Product Overview
tasks.description: Learn the full product suite and value proposition
tasks.instructions: Review product documentation and attend the product overview session.

tasks.title: Roadmap Review
tasks.description: Review the current product roadmap and priorities
tasks.instructions: Study the Q1-Q4 roadmap and understand strategic priorities.

tasks.title: Stakeholder Introductions
tasks.description: Meet key stakeholders across departments
tasks.instructions: Schedule 30-min intro meetings with engineering, sales, and support leads.

tasks.title: Analytics Setup
tasks.description: Get access to analytics tools and dashboards
tasks.instructions: Set up access to Mixpanel, Amplitude, and internal dashboards.

tasks.title: First Feature Spec
tasks.description: Write your first feature specification document
tasks.instructions: Draft a PRD for a small feature improvement.

tasks.title: User Research Observation
tasks.description: Observe a user research session
tasks.instructions: Join a user interview or usability test session.

tasks.title: PM Certification
tasks.description: Complete the internal PM certification
tasks.instructions: Pass the product management assessment with 80%+ score.

name: Marketing Onboarding
description: Onboarding program for marketing team members

tasks.title: Brand Guidelines Review
tasks.description: Study the company brand guidelines and style guide
tasks.instructions: Read the brand book and review past campaigns for reference.

tasks.title: Marketing Tools Setup
tasks.description: Set up access to all marketing tools and platforms
tasks.instructions: Get access to HubSpot, Canva, Google Analytics, and social media accounts.

tasks.title: Campaign Review
tasks.description: Review past and current marketing campaigns
tasks.instructions: Study the last 3 major campaigns including results and learnings.

tasks.title: Content Calendar Training
tasks.description: Learn the content planning and scheduling process
tasks.instructions: Review the content calendar and create a sample post.

tasks.title: First Campaign Contribution
tasks.description: Contribute to an active marketing campaign
tasks.instructions: Write 3 social media posts or 1 blog draft for review.

tasks.title: Marketing Certification
tasks.description: Complete the marketing fundamentals certification
tasks.instructions: Pass the internal marketing certification exam.

name: Operations Onboarding
description: Onboarding program for operations team members

tasks.title: Operations Overview
tasks.description: Learn the operations team structure and responsibilities
tasks.instructions: Attend the operations overview session and review the org chart.

tasks.title: Systems Access Setup
tasks.description: Get access to all operations systems and tools
tasks.instructions: Set up access to ticketing, monitoring, and reporting tools.

tasks.title: Process Documentation Review
tasks.description: Review all standard operating procedures
tasks.instructions: Read through the SOPs for key operations processes.

tasks.title: Compliance Training
tasks.description: Complete mandatory compliance training modules
tasks.instructions: Complete all compliance training courses and pass assessments.

tasks.title: First Independent Tasks
tasks.description: Handle your first set of operations tickets independently
tasks.instructions: Process 5 support tickets with minimal supervision.

tasks.title: Operations Certification
tasks.description: Complete the operations team certification
tasks.instructions: Pass the operations certification exam with 80%+ score.

name: Manager Onboarding
description: Onboarding program for new team managers

tasks.title: Manager Welcome
tasks.description: Executive welcome session with leadership
tasks.instructions: Attend the manager welcome meeting with VP of Engineering.

tasks.title: Team Overview
tasks.description: Review your team's current projects and performance
tasks.instructions: Meet with outgoing manager and review team dashboard.

tasks.title: HR Processes Training
tasks.description: Learn HR processes for managers (hiring, reviews, PTO)
tasks.instructions: Complete the manager HR training modules.

tasks.title: Performance Review Training
tasks.description: Learn how to conduct performance reviews
tasks.instructions: Complete the performance management training course.

tasks.title: Budget Training
tasks.description: Learn budget planning and expense management
tasks.instructions: Review the budget planning process and tools.

tasks.title: First 1:1 Meetings
tasks.description: Conduct initial 1:1 meetings with all team members
tasks.instructions: Schedule and hold 30-min 1:1s with each direct report.

tasks.title: Hiring Process Training
tasks.description: Learn the interview and hiring process
tasks.instructions: Complete interviewer training and shadow an interview.

tasks.title: Manager Certification
tasks.description: Complete the management certification program
tasks.instructions: Pass the leadership certification assessment.

name: General Onboarding
description: Basic onboarding checklist applicable to any role

tasks.title: Welcome Email
tasks.description: Read the welcome email and onboarding guide
tasks.instructions: Read all welcome communications and save important links.

tasks.title: HR Paperwork
tasks.description: Complete all required HR paperwork
tasks.instructions: Fill out tax forms, emergency contacts, and sign agreements.

tasks.title: IT Equipment Setup
tasks.description: Receive and set up your IT equipment
tasks.instructions: Collect laptop, monitor, and peripherals from IT desk.

tasks.title: Badge and Access
tasks.description: Get your employee badge and building access
tasks.instructions: Visit security to get your badge and access card.

tasks.title: Building Tour
tasks.description: Take a tour of the office building
tasks.instructions: Join the guided office tour at 10 AM on your first day.

tasks.title: Team Introduction
tasks.description: Meet your immediate team members
tasks.instructions: Attend the team standup and introduce yourself.

tasks.title: First Week Check-in
tasks.description: Check-in with your manager about your first week
tasks.instructions: Schedule a 15-minute check-in to discuss your first week experience.

tasks.title: Completion Survey
tasks.description: Complete the onboarding feedback survey
tasks.instructions: Fill out the survey to help us improve the onboarding experience.
